title: Awesome Commands
body:
# Awesome Commands

**Part of the Awesome Mods** -- requires https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-core!

- back
- enderchest [player]
- fly [player]
- heal [player]
- home
- inventory [player]
- invulnerable [player]
- repair [player]
- sethome
- spawn
- top [player]

https://github.com/shkschneider/mc_awesome/blob/main/README.md
